scripts.check:app: npm --prefix app run lint && npm --prefix app run typecheck && npm --prefix app run test
scripts.check:api: npm --prefix api run typecheck && npm --prefix api run test
scripts.check:infra: npm --prefix infra run typecheck && npm --prefix infra run test && npm --prefix infra run synth:check
scripts.check: npm run check:app && npm run check:api && npm run check:infra && npm run check:success
